# Chapter 3: Solutions, electrochemistry, batteries  (~100 pp)
- 3.1 Solutions and concentration (10) · 3.2 Electrochemical cells (15) · 3.3 Electrode potentials (12) · 3.4 Electrolysis (12) · 3.5 Battery chemistries: lead-acid, NiCd, NiMH, Li-ion, LiFePO4, sodium, flow (20) · 3.6 Fuel cells (10) · 3.7 Failure section: thermal runaway in Li-ion, dendrite formation, Galaxy Note 7, Boeing 787 (21)

**Archetype**: transport (charge), failure. **Project**: build a lemon battery; characterise its capacity. **Exercises**: 30.
